note: Pinned inputs for `pnpm --filter @erdou/runtime-vm download-assets` and `bake`. These produce gitignored artifacts in this dir; nothing binary is committed.

kernel.source: v86 buildroot bzImage (9p+virtio) from the v86 project's asset host (buildroot-bzimage68.bin, same file its examples boot). The host has no commit-addressed URLs, so the sha256 pin below is the integrity anchor; download-assets.mjs refuses any bytes that don't match it. Verified byte-identical to the R11-spike blob on 2026-07-18.

bios.source: v86 repo build assets (bios/ dir), pinned by immutable commit SHA 2f1346b0 (master as of 2026-07-18; the blobs' bytes last changed 2023-08-06 in b8a39b11). Verified byte-identical to the R11-spike blobs.
